Commentary: Jayden Lennox to Gudakesh Motie, no run, slow and short outside off, Motie punches to cover
Jayden Lennox to Gudakesh Motie, 2 runs, floaty full delivery just outside off, Motie lifts it back over the bowler's head off the toe end. Long-on tidies up and keeps it down to a double
Jayden Lennox to Gudakesh Motie, no run, full at the stumps, pushed back to the bowler
Jayden Lennox to Gudakesh Motie, 1 run, attempts to heave down the ground and skews it off the thick inside half towards long-on
Jayden Lennox to Amir Jangoo, 1 run, 100 up for the West Indies. Jangoo comes down the track and forces the drive through extra cover
Jayden Lennox to Gudakesh Motie, FOUR, much-needed hits these for the West Indies. Motie wallops straight and times it well enough to race away to the long-off fence
Michael Bracewell to Amir Jangoo, no run, full on the stumps, Jangoo with a big stride forward to block into the off-side

Michael Bracewell to Amir Jangoo, 1 run, punched off the back foot to the right of cover. The fielder dives and fumbles, creating a yes-no situation for the batters. It all ends well for the home side though
Michael Bracewell to Gudakesh Motie, 1 run, fuller on off, Motie drives it to the right of long-off
Michael Bracewell to Amir Jangoo, 1 run, quicker on off stump, Jangoo forces it down to long-off
Michael Bracewell to Gudakesh Motie, no run, cut away hard to the right of the diving fielder at backward point
Michael Bracewell to Gudakesh Motie, 1 run, opens the bat face and punches this to the right of sweeper cover for a strike-retaining single
Jayden Lennox to Gudakesh Motie, FOUR, Jayden errs in line and gets punished! Motie picks it off his pads and helps it away to the fine leg fence with a well-timed flick
Jayden Lennox to Gudakesh Motie, 1 run, tossed up just outside off, driven away to the right of long-off
Jayden Lennox to Amir Jangoo, 1 run, goes on the back foot and clips the slower length delivery to the left of mid-wicket
Jayden Lennox to Gudakesh Motie, 2 runs, allows the ball to turn in and tickles it off his pads to the left of short fine

Jayden Lennox to Gudakesh Motie, no run, appeal for leg before, but New Zealand not interested in the review. Did Motie get some bat on it? Looks like it. It turned in sharply from a length before taking a feather of an inside-edge onto the front pad
Jayden Lennox to Gudakesh Motie, no run, fuller from Jayden, driven back to the left of the bowler
Michael Bracewell to Amir Jangoo, no run
Michael Bracewell to Amir Jangoo, no run
Michael Bracewell to Amir Jangoo, FOUR, to deep backward point
Michael Bracewell to Amir Jangoo, no run
Michael Bracewell to Amir Jangoo, 1 run, tossed up on off, Jangoo opens the bat face and drives all along the ground to sweeper cover
Michael Bracewell to Gudakesh Motie, no run, full on leg stump, Motie leans across and blocks it out to cover
Jayden Lennox to Amir Jangoo, 2 runs, slower and wider of off, Jangoo slices the drive to the right of backward point and picks up an easy double
Jayden Lennox to Amir Jangoo, 1 run, waits on the back foot and pings the punch to the right of sweeper cover
Jayden Lennox to Gudakesh Motie, no run, flicked off the pads to the left of Santner at short mid-wicket
Jayden Lennox to Gudakesh Motie, no run, full and just outside off, played back to the bowler
Jayden Lennox to Gudakesh Motie, no run, looks to flick and gets a leading edge to the right of cover
Jayden Lennox to Gudakesh Motie, 1 run, to long-on
Michael Bracewell to Gudakesh Motie, no run, flighted delivery just outside off, Motie drives straight to backward point
Michael Bracewell to Gudakesh Motie, no run, slapped off the back foot but straight to Santner at short extra cover
Michael Bracewell to Gudakesh Motie, 2 runs, square of the wicket
